findings.description: JSP custom tags `field:block` and `t:page_template` are used prominently in the JSP implementation example in s2 but are absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP example contains `<field:block title="гғҰгғјгӮ¶жғ…е ұ">` and `<t:page_template title="гғҰгғјгӮ¶жғ…е ұзҷ»йҢІ" confirmationPageTitle="гғҰгғјгӮ¶жғ…е ұзҷ»йҢІзўәиӘҚ">` вҖ” both are Nablarch-specific tag library elements that users may search for.
